title: chrysopogon royleanus
intro: Chrysopogon royleanus, also known as Vetiver grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysopogon royleanus include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Chrysopogon royleanus can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and extracts, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine practices.
